note: Day 7 (2026-06-22): Week 1 Review day. Days 1-6 content backfilled in this run (content/ was empty on entry). All 12 spec points (Days 1-6) received notes + question banks. Real chem-validator QA gate: notes 12/12 pass; question banks initially 5/12 pass — 7 failed on non-OCR command words (Name/Identify) + one spec-boundary leak (2.1.3a Q13); question-generator applied the fixes and re-QA is now 12/12 pass/pass. Module 2 mock assembled then corrected to 39 marks / 45 min (header had wrongly declared 35/35; one non-OCR 'Define' fixed; 3 command-word mismatches relabelled). Mock covers Moles (2.1.3a/b/c) + Redox (2.1.5a/b) + Electron Structure (2.2.1a/b) only. Mock awaits student sitting on Complete Day 7. (Frequencies: the 8 mock/Module-2-core points 2.1.3a/b/c, 2.1.4b, 2.1.5a/b, 2.2.1a/b are HIGH; foundation points 2.1.1a=MED, 2.1.2a/b=LOW, 2.1.4a=MED.) Advisory backlog: 2.1.4a Q5/Q8/Q11/Q14 use 'Describe' with a 'Write the equation' verb — relabel to 'State' in next content sweep.

mocksPending.note: Corrected from a wrongly-declared 35/35. Student sits this mock on Complete Day 7. Validator marks answers. Supervisor writes weakTopics from topics scoring <70%. mock-runner records paperScore to coordinator/results/mock-2026-06-22.json.

log.note: Day 7 = Review day. imports/localStorage-export.json absent; proceeding on schedule order. currentDay 7 confirmed from START_DATE 2026-06-16 + today 2026-06-22.
12 notes generated (HIGH-frequency first). All match generateLesson schema.
12 question banks generated. 15 questions (5 trios) per spec point. All original. No question exceeds 3 marks. Units present in calc questions.

An inline ('supervisor-inline') QA pass had recorded all 12 as pass with no fixes. This was SUPERSEDED by the real chem-validator gate below, which caught 7 question-bank failures the inline pass missed.

Initial assembly from 7 spec points (Moles + Redox + Electron Structure). 10x1-mark Section A; 12x mixed 2-/3-mark Section B. Header wrongly declared 35 marks (actual sum 39); contained a non-OCR 'Define' command word. Corrected below.

Real chem-validator (Opus) gate on current on-disk content. Notes 12/12 pass. Question banks 5/12 pass; FAILED: 2.1.3a (Q13 out-of-spec concentration leak), 2.1.4a, 2.1.4b, 2.1.5a, 2.1.5b, 2.2.1a, 2.2.1b (non-OCR command words Name/Identify). Verdicts overwritten with validator=chem-validator.

Applied the validator's exact fixes to the 7 failed banks: replaced Name/Identify with OCR command words (State/Deduce) and rewrote 2.1.3a Q13 to a 2.1.3a-only recall (Avogadro constant). Marks/ladder preserved.

Re-QA of the 7 fixed banks: all now questions=pass. Day-7 content is 12/12 pass/pass. Advisory (not a fail): 2.1.4a Q5/Q8/Q11/Q14 'Describe'+'Write the equation' verb mismatch — relabel to 'State' in next sweep.

Corrected mock: totalMarks 35->39 (now equals actual sum), timeLimitMin 35->45 (~1 min/mark + reading). Q4 'Define'->'State'; Q15/Q17 'Describe'->'Write'; Q21 'Calculate'->'Deduce'. Topics unchanged (Moles+Redox+Electron Structure).

Run phase done: 12/12 content pass, mock assembled+corrected (39 marks). weakTopics empty and mocksRun=0 until the student sits the mock and 'Complete Day 7' is run. No commit yet (commit happens on Complete Day 7).
